error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to a verified DAX88 on TCP port 8899.
error.no_devices_found: No DAX88 devices were found on that subnet.
error.scan_too_large: The subnet is too large to scan. Use a /23 or smaller subnet.

manual.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of the DAX88. Matrix control uses raw TCP on port 8899.
manual.title: Add DAX88

scan.description: Actively scan for DAX88 devices by sending the Matrio query to TCP port 8899.
scan.title: Scan for DAX88
